sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after n in after_seg['nodes']}
for nid in before_nodes:
    if nid in after_nodes:
        b = before_nodes[nid]
        a = after_nodes[nid]
        if b['boundary'] != a['boundary']:
            print(f"Node {nid} moved: {b['boundary']} -> {a['boundary']}")
# Now try moving RIGHT again to see if the same thing moves further
action(['RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
